Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows significantly elevated creatinine, proteinuria, microalbuminuria, and abnormal urine findings (cloudy, brown, low specific gravity, bilirubin present), suggesting impaired renal function with possible nephrotic syndrome or glomerular disease. Low HbA1c and normal glucose exclude diabetes. Mildly low CO₂ may indicate mild metabolic acidosis. Slightly elevated LDL is noted. Recommend urgent nephrology evaluation for further assessment and management.
